query: SELECT id, name, price, retailPrice, photos, status, rating FROM products WHERE name IN ('Girl Scout Cookies', 'Zkittlez', 'Blue Dream', 'OG Kush', 'Sour Diesel', 'Wedding Cake', 'Gelato #33', 'Gorilla Glue #4', 'Granddaddy Purple', 'Jack Herer') ORDER BY id;
